message:
test(wave-57): derive trait coverage for DetRng, DetHasher, AssignmentStrategy, SocketAncillary

7 new tests: util (DetRng Debug/Clone, DetHasher Debug/Clone,
DetBuildHasher Clone/Default), assignment (AssignmentStrategy,
ReplicaAssignment), ancillary (SocketAncillary Debug/Default,
AncillaryMessages Debug).
